title: VOXELSHOCK
description: VOXELSHOCK was an experimental Minecraft modpack developed with focuses on world generation, movement, combat, and challenging but fair gameplay. Runs surprisingly well on an old laptop I've got.
body:
![Pixel text with stylized background. Text says "VOXELSHOCK".](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/CiptrO2j/images/0dadc718479e8264b0ef29d4699c05c984a44e96.png)

# Archived, will not be supported in the future. 
# [Read this, if you want.](https://pastebin.com/P77hHS25)
___


VOXELSHOCK was an experimental Minecraft modpack developed with focuses on world generation, movement, combat, and challenging but fair gameplay. 
Runs surprisingly well on an old laptop I've got.
___

~~~~ If you need assistance with anything, 
**please [join the discord server](https://discord.gg/hqyS4YpqSn) or contact me directly through either Github or Discord, at satellaview_dev and satellaview.dev respectively.**

**Also, if you're playing singleplayer, you should download [this resource pack for the Manic mod.](https://github.com/VisiVersa/Manic/releases/download/1.0.3/resourcepack.zip)** 
Unless you want to fight floating potion bottles instead of monsters... In that case, I guess it's down to personal preference.~~~~


# SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
**VOXELSHOCK will most likely run on any computer released or built within the past 10 years.**

* **Computer**. VOXELSHOCK requires at least
an Intel Core i5-4690 3.5GHz / AMD A10-7800 APU 3.5 GHz / Intel HD 4000 or equivalent, and ~~MS-DOS version 5.0~~ any modern operating system capable of running _Minecraft_ should be fine.

* **Video Card**. GeForce 700 Series or AMD Radeon Rx 200 Series (excluding integrated chipsets) with OpenGL 4.5
Hard Drive. 

* **Joystick** (optional). VOXELSHOCK now has partial controller support. More to come soon.

* **Memory** You must have a minimum of 2-4 gigabytes of RAM allocated to VOXELSHOCK to play the game on the official server. If you would like to host a **dedicated** VOXELSHOCK server, it uses a similar amount of ram. If you would like to play singleplayer VOXELSHOCK, you need a minimum of 6 gigabytes. If you would like to host a server and play on the same machine, you will need 10 gigabytes of RAM allocated to the server and instance.

LEGAL STUFF 😱 (mods that require attribution are listed below)

[legendary tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips)
